---
title: "CCC Analysis: `r params$sample`"
author: "Lei Qin"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: yes
    toc: yes
    keep_tex: no
fontsize: 10pt
geometry: margin=1in
params:
  sample:         "MH0026"
  data_list_path: "/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/Benchmarking/BenchmarkingNEW/00_process_aligned_data/overlapped_data_list_AllSample.rds"
  output_dir:     "."       # directory for output RDS and PDF files
  run_blisa:      true      # FALSE = skip BLISA and load pre-computed results from output_dir
  ct_group:       "SingleR_labels"
---

```{r knitr-opts, echo=FALSE, results='hide', message=FALSE, cache=FALSE}
library(knitr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width  = 7,
  fig.height = 7,
  fig.path   = paste0("figure/", params$sample, "_"),
  fig.align  = "center",
  out.width  = "90%",
  error      = FALSE,
  prompt     = TRUE,
  comment    = NA,
  dpi        = 300,
  dev        = "pdf",
  dev.args   = list(pointsize = 15),
  cache      = TRUE,
  cache.path = paste0("cache/", params$sample, "_"),
  cache.lazy = FALSE,
  echo       = TRUE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  message    = FALSE
)
options(width = 110, digits = 3)
pdf.options(useDingbats = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scCustomize)
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(pander)
library(tinytex)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(data.table)
library(ggExtra)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)
library(FNN)
library(CellChat)
source("/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/spatial_functions.R")
source("/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/plotting_functions.R")
source("/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/Benchmarking/Benchmarking/Manuscript_figures/plots.R")
source("/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/Benchmarking/BenchmarkingNEW/CCC/Benchmarking_CCC_codes_backup/runBLISA_0416.R")

# CCIspatial override: supports Seurat objects and BLISA output using bin_sf
CCIspatial <- function(
    seu,
    BLISA_output,
    index,
    cell_to_hex = NULL,
    ct_group    = "cell_type",
    top         = 30,
    hex_size    = 50,
    dmax        = 250,
    rotate_cw90 = FALSE  # rotate 90° clockwise to match Seurat orientation
) {
  # 1. Setup Data
  LRI_sum <- BLISA_output$LR_out
  hex_sf  <- BLISA_output$bin_sf   # spot-aligned BLISA stores bin_sf, not hex_sf

  interaction <- unname(unlist(LRI_sum[index, c("ligand.symbol", "receptor.symbol")]))
  sigHH       <- LRI_sum$sig_index[[index]]
  mode        <- LRI_sum$ccc_mode[index]

  # 2. Neighbors
  if (mode == "nearby" && !is.null(BLISA_output$queen_nb_full)) {
    nb_list <- BLISA_output$queen_nb_full
  } else if (mode != "nearby" && !is.null(BLISA_output$dist_nb_full)) {
    nb_list <- BLISA_output$dist_nb_full
  } else {
    centroids <- sf::st_centroid(hex_sf)
    coords    <- sf::st_coordinates(centroids)
    nb_list   <- if (mode == "nearby") spdep::dnearneigh(centroids, 0, 1.2 * hex_size)
                 else                  spdep::dnearneigh(coords, 0, dmax)
  }
  
  # 3. Mapping cells to bins
  if (is.null(cell_to_hex)) stop("cell_to_hex must be provided for spot-aligned mode")

  expr_mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(seu, slot = "counts")
  # split "GENEA, GENEB" → min expression across subunits (same logic as get_ct_sums)
  complex_expr <- function(gene_str) {
    genes <- unlist(strsplit(gsub("\\s+", "", gene_str), "[,_]"))
    rows  <- intersect(genes, rownames(expr_mat))
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(rep(0L, ncol(expr_mat)))
    raw <- expr_mat[rows, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(raw) > 1) apply(raw, 2, min) else as.numeric(raw)
  }
  ct_vec   <- as.character(seu[[ct_group]][, 1])
  cell_data <- data.table::data.table(
    hex_id        = as.integer(cell_to_hex),
    ct            = ct_vec,
    ligand_expr   = complex_expr(interaction[1]),
    receptor_expr = complex_expr(interaction[2])
  )
  
  # 4. Interaction Scoring (Receiver in HH, Sender in Neighbors)
  rcpt_summary <- cell_data[hex_id %in% sigHH,
                             .(r_sum = sum(receptor_expr)), by = .(hex_id, ct_r = ct)]

  hh_nb_map <- data.table::data.table(
    hh_hex = rep(sigHH, sapply(nb_list[sigHH], length)),
    nb_hex  = unlist(nb_list[sigHH])
  )

  lig_summary <- merge(hh_nb_map, cell_data,
                       by.x = "nb_hex", by.y = "hex_id", allow.cartesian = TRUE)
  lig_summary <- lig_summary[, .(l_sum = sum(ligand_expr)), by = .(hh_hex, ct_l = ct)]

  # Merge and find top pair per hotspot
  merged_scores <- merge(rcpt_summary, lig_summary,
                         by.x = "hex_id", by.y = "hh_hex", allow.cartesian = TRUE)
  merged_scores[, product   := (log10(r_sum + 1) + log10(l_sum + 1)) / 2]
  merged_scores[, cell_pair := paste(ct_l, ct_r, sep = " \u2192 ")]

  top_pairs <- merged_scores[merged_scores[, .I[which.max(product)], by = hex_id]$V1]

  # 5. Legend and Filtering Logic
  tbl            <- sort(table(top_pairs$cell_pair), decreasing = TRUE)
  filtered_pairs <- names(tbl[seq_len(min(top, length(tbl)))])
  legend_title   <- if (length(tbl) <= top) "All pairs" else paste0("Top ", top, " pairs")

  top_pairs[, cell_pair_plot := ifelse(cell_pair %in% filtered_pairs, cell_pair, "rare pairs")]

  hex_sf$cell_pair_plot <- ifelse(hex_sf$n_cells > 0, "Non-Significant", "Empty")
  hex_sf$cell_pair_plot[top_pairs$hex_id] <- top_pairs$cell_pair_plot

  legend_levels         <- c(filtered_pairs, "rare pairs", "Non-Significant", "Empty")
  hex_sf$cell_pair_plot <- factor(hex_sf$cell_pair_plot, levels = legend_levels)

  if (rotate_cw90) {
    xy      <- sf::st_coordinates(hex_sf)
    plot_df <- cbind(sf::st_drop_geometry(hex_sf), x_plot = xy[, 2], y_plot = -xy[, 1])
    p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x_plot, y = y_plot, color = cell_pair_plot)) +
      geom_point(size = 2, stroke = 0) + coord_fixed()
  } else {
    p <- ggplot(hex_sf) +
      geom_sf(aes(color = cell_pair_plot), size = 2, stroke = 0)
  }

  p +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Empty"           = "#F0F0F0",
      "Non-Significant" = "#D3D3D3",
      "rare pairs"      = "#818589",
      setNames(cols[seq_along(filtered_pairs)], filtered_pairs)
    )) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = legend_title, override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
    labs(
      title    = paste0(rownames(LRI_sum)[index], ": Interacting Hotspots"),
      subtitle = "Grey: light = empty bins, medium = non-significant bins"
    )
}

shared_genes <- readRDS("/vast/projects/Spatial/lei/Benchmarking/BenchmarkingNEW/00_process_aligned_data/shared_genes_withVisium.rds")
```


```{r}
# rmarkdown::render("CCC_sample_analysis.Rmd",
#   params = list(
#     sample     = "MH0007",
#     output_dir = "MH0007"
#   ),
#   output_file = "MH0007/MH0007_CCC.pdf"
# )
```

# Load data

```{r load-data}
sample <- params$sample

overlapped_data_list_AllSample <- readRDS(params$data_list_path)

seu_v <- overlapped_data_list_AllSample[[sample]]$Visium
seu_x <- overlapped_data_list_AllSample[[sample]]$Xenium
seu_m <- overlapped_data_list_AllSample[[sample]]$MERSCOPE

has_merscope <- !is.null(seu_m)
message("Platforms available: Visium, Xenium",
        if (has_merscope) ", MERSCOPE" else " (no MERSCOPE)")
```

# Visium spot distance

```{r spot-coords}
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(seu_v)

coords_df <- data.frame(
  cell_id    = rownames(coords),
  x_centroid = coords[, "imagecol"],
  y_centroid = coords[, "imagerow"],
  row.names  = rownames(coords)
)

spot_ids <- coords_df$cell_id
spot_sf  <- sf::st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("imagerow", "imagecol"), crs = NA)
rownames(spot_sf) <- spot_ids

spot_sf$Xenium_cell_count_filtered <- seu_v$Xenium_cell_count_filtered[rownames(spot_sf)]

if (has_merscope) {spot_sf$MERSCOPE_cell_count_filtered <- seu_v$MERSCOPE_cell_count_filtered[rownames(spot_sf)]}
```

```{r spot-distance}
nn           <- FNN::get.knn(sf::st_coordinates(spot_sf), k = 1)
nearest_dist <- nn$nn.dist[, 1]
coords_df$nearest_dist <- nearest_dist

hist(nearest_dist, breaks = 100,
     main = paste(sample, "— Nearest Spot Distance"),
     xlab = "Distance (pixels)")

ggplot(coords_df, aes(x = x_centroid, y = y_centroid, color = nearest_dist)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle(paste(sample, "— Nearest Neighbour Distance per Spot"))
```
```{r}
small_region <- coords_df %>%
  filter(x_centroid > 50 & x_centroid < 70,
         y_centroid > 180 & y_centroid < 200)

ggplot(small_region, aes(x = x_centroid, y = y_centroid)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("(", round(x_centroid,1), ", ", round(y_centroid,1), ")")),
            vjust = -0.7, size = 3) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("Spot centres (small region)")
```

```{r spot-distance-theoretical}
d_theoretical <- visium_spot_distance(seu_v, "lowres")
message("Theoretical Visium spot distance (lowres px): ", round(d_theoretical, 2))
d_theoretical
```

# BLISA

```{r blisa-paths}
out          <- params$output_dir
blisa_v_path <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_BLISA_v.rds"))
blisa_x_path <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_BLISA_x.rds"))
blisa_m_path <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_BLISA_m.rds"))
```

```{r blisa-run, eval=params$run_blisa}
# --- Visium (native spot counts) ---
counts_v_spot <- GetAssayData(seu_v, assay = "Spatial", slot = "counts")
counts_v_spot <- counts_v_spot[intersect(rownames(counts_v_spot), shared_genes), , drop = FALSE]

LR_v <- filterLRpairs(counts = counts_v_spot, min_ligand = 1, min_receptor = 1,
                      LR_df  = CellChatDB.human$interaction)

message("Running BLISA for Visium ...")
system.time(
  BLISA_v <- runBLISA.default.isolates.removed(counts_matrix = counts_v_spot, bin_sf = spot_sf,
                               LR_df = LR_v, dmax = d_theoretical * 2,
                               hex_size = d_theoretical, n_cells_col = NA)
)
saveRDS(BLISA_v, blisa_v_path)
message("Saved: ", blisa_v_path)

# --- Xenium (aggregated to Visium spots) ---
counts_x_spot <- aggregate_cells_to_spots(seu_x, shared_genes, spot_ids_keep = spot_ids)

LR_x <- filterLRpairs(counts = counts_x_spot, min_ligand = 1, min_receptor = 1,
                      LR_df  = CellChatDB.human$interaction)

message("Running BLISA for Xenium ...")
system.time(
  BLISA_x <- runBLISA.default.isolates.removed(counts_matrix = counts_x_spot, bin_sf = spot_sf,
                               LR_df = LR_x, dmax = d_theoretical * 2,
                               hex_size = d_theoretical, 
                      n_cells_col = "Xenium_cell_count_filtered")
)
saveRDS(BLISA_x, blisa_x_path)
message("Saved: ", blisa_x_path)

# --- MERSCOPE (if available) ---
if (has_merscope) {
  counts_m_spot <- aggregate_cells_to_spots(seu_m, shared_genes, spot_ids_keep = spot_ids)

  LR_m <- filterLRpairs(counts = counts_m_spot, min_ligand = 1, min_receptor = 1,
                        LR_df  = CellChatDB.human$interaction)

  message("Running BLISA for MERSCOPE ...")
  system.time(
    BLISA_m <- runBLISA.default.isolates.removed(counts_matrix = counts_m_spot, bin_sf = spot_sf,
                                 LR_df = LR_m, dmax = d_theoretical * 2,
                                 hex_size = d_theoretical, 
                      n_cells_col = "MERSCOPE_cell_count_filtered")
  )
  saveRDS(BLISA_m, blisa_m_path)
  message("Saved: ", blisa_m_path)
}
```

```{r blisa-load, eval=!params$run_blisa}
BLISA_v <- readRDS(blisa_v_path)
BLISA_x <- readRDS(blisa_x_path)
if (has_merscope) BLISA_m <- readRDS(blisa_m_path)
message("Loaded pre-computed BLISA results from ", out)
```

```{r counts-ensure}
# Aggregated counts are needed for spatial gene expression plots.
# Reconstruct if loading pre-computed BLISA (they are not stored inside BLISA objects).
if (!exists("counts_x_spot"))
  counts_x_spot <- aggregate_cells_to_spots(seu_x, shared_genes, spot_ids_keep = spot_ids)
if (has_merscope && !exists("counts_m_spot"))
  counts_m_spot <- aggregate_cells_to_spots(seu_m, shared_genes, spot_ids_keep = spot_ids)
```

# LRI results

## LRI ranking plots

```{r lri-ranking, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_v$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— Visium")))
print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_x$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— Xenium")))
if (has_merscope)
  print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_m$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— MERSCOPE")))
```

```{r lri-ranking-pdf}
ranking_pdf <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_LRI_ranking.pdf"))
pdf(ranking_pdf, width = 8, height = 10)
print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_v$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— Visium")))
print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_x$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— Xenium")))
if (has_merscope)
  print(plotLRIsum(BLISA_m$LR_out) + ggtitle(paste(sample, "— MERSCOPE")))
dev.off()
message("Saved: ", ranking_pdf)
```

## LRI spatial plots

```{r lri-spatial-fns}
# Per-platform gene expression projected onto the Visium tissue image
plot_gene_platform <- function(gene, platform) {
  if (platform == "v") {
    if (!gene %in% rownames(seu_v)) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    SpatialFeaturePlot(seu_v, gene, pt.size.factor = 2.5, slot = "counts") +
      ggtitle(paste("Visium", gene))
  } else if (platform == "x") {
    if (!gene %in% rownames(counts_x_spot)) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    seu_v[[paste0("x_", gene)]] <- counts_x_spot[gene, ]
    SpatialFeaturePlot(seu_v, paste0("x_", gene), pt.size.factor = 2.5) +
      ggtitle(paste("Xenium", gene))
  } else if (platform == "m") {
    if (!has_merscope || !gene %in% rownames(counts_m_spot)) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    seu_v[[paste0("m_", gene)]] <- counts_m_spot[gene, ]
    SpatialFeaturePlot(seu_v, paste0("m_", gene), pt.size.factor = 2.5) +
      ggtitle(paste("MERSCOPE", gene))
  } else {
    ggplot() + theme_void()
  }
}

# Per-platform BLISA -log10(p) spatial plot
plot_lri_platform <- function(lr, platform) {
  if (platform == "v") {
    if (!lr %in% BLISA_v$LR_out$interaction_name) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    plot_LRI(seu_v, BLISA_v$LR_out, LR = lr) + ggtitle(paste("Visium", lr))
  } else if (platform == "x") {
    if (!lr %in% BLISA_x$LR_out$interaction_name) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    plot_LRI(seu_v, BLISA_x$LR_out, LR = lr) + ggtitle(paste("Xenium", lr))
  } else if (platform == "m") {
    if (!has_merscope || !lr %in% BLISA_m$LR_out$interaction_name) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    plot_LRI(seu_v, BLISA_m$LR_out, LR = lr) + ggtitle(paste("MERSCOPE", lr))
  } else {
    ggplot() + theme_void()
  }
}

# Combined layout: ligand row / receptor row / LRI row, across all platforms
# plot_one_lr <- function(lr) {
#   genes     <- strsplit(lr, "_")[[1]]
#   L         <- genes[1]
#   R         <- genes[2]
#   platforms <- c("v", "x", if (has_merscope) "m")
# 
#   make_row <- function(fn, arg) Reduce(`|`, lapply(platforms, function(p) fn(arg, p)))
# 
#   row_L   <- make_row(plot_gene_platform, L)
#   row_LRI <- make_row(plot_lri_platform,  lr)
# 
#   if (L == R) {
#     (row_L / row_LRI) + plot_annotation(title = lr)
#   } else {
#     (row_L / make_row(plot_gene_platform, R) / row_LRI) + plot_annotation(title = lr)
#   }
# }

plot_one_lr <- function(lr) {
  
  genes <- strsplit(lr, "_")[[1]]
  L <- genes[1]
  R <- genes[2]
  
  row_L <- plot_gene_platform(L, "v") |
           plot_gene_platform(L, "x") |
           plot_gene_platform(L, "m")
  
  row_LRI <- plot_lri_platform(lr, "v") |
             plot_lri_platform(lr, "x") |
             plot_lri_platform(lr, "m")
  
  if (L == R) {
    return((row_L / row_LRI) + plot_annotation(title = lr))
  }
  
  row_R <- plot_gene_platform(R, "v") |
           plot_gene_platform(R, "x") |
           plot_gene_platform(R, "m")
  
  return((row_L / row_R / row_LRI) + plot_annotation(title = lr))
}
```

```{r lri-spatial-pdf}
lr_v   <- BLISA_v$LR_out$interaction_name
lr_x   <- BLISA_x$LR_out$interaction_name
lr_m   <- if (has_merscope) BLISA_m$LR_out$interaction_name else character(0)
lr_all <- unique(c(lr_v, lr_m, lr_x))   # Visium-first, then MERSCOPE, then Xenium-only
message(length(lr_all), " unique LR pairs across all platforms")

spatial_pdf <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_LRI_spatial.pdf"))
plots        <- lapply(lr_all, plot_one_lr)
plot_groups  <- split(plots, ceiling(seq_along(plots) / 2))

pdf(spatial_pdf, width = 10, height = if (has_merscope) 18 else 14)
for (pg in plot_groups) print(wrap_plots(pg, ncol = 1))
dev.off()
message("Saved: ", spatial_pdf)
```

# CCI analysis

```{r cci-run}
cci_x_path <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCI_x.rds"))
cci_m_path <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCI_m.rds"))

message("Running CCI for Xenium ...")
CCI_x <- runCCI_SpotAligned_MatchingWeights(
  seu = seu_x, BLISA_res = BLISA_x, spot_ids = spot_ids,
  ct_group = params$ct_group
)
saveRDS(CCI_x, cci_x_path)
message("Saved: ", cci_x_path)

if (has_merscope) {
  message("Running CCI for MERSCOPE ...")
  CCI_m <- runCCI_SpotAligned_MatchingWeights(
    seu = seu_m, BLISA_res = BLISA_m, spot_ids = spot_ids,
    ct_group = params$ct_group
  )
  saveRDS(CCI_m, cci_m_path)
  message("Saved: ", cci_m_path)
}
```

## CCI heatmaps

```{r cci-heatmap, fig.height=20, fig.width=15, out.width="100%"}
CCIheatmap(CCI_x)
if (has_merscope) CCIheatmap(CCI_m)
```

```{r cci-heatmap-pdf}
cci_pdf <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCI_heatmap.pdf"))
pdf(cci_pdf, width = 15, height = 20)
CCIheatmap(CCI_x)
if (has_merscope) CCIheatmap(CCI_m)
dev.off()
message("Saved: ", cci_pdf)
```

## Single LR pair heatmap (CSF1–CSF1R)

```{r cci-single-lr, fig.height=5, fig.width=6, out.width="100%"}
lr_example <- "CSF1_CSF1R"

if (lr_example %in% colnames(CCI_x))
  draw(CCIheatmapOneLR(CCI_x, lr_example),
       heatmap_legend_side = "right", padding = unit(c(5, 5, 10, 10), "mm"))

if (has_merscope && lr_example %in% colnames(CCI_m))
  draw(CCIheatmapOneLR(CCI_m, lr_example),
       heatmap_legend_side = "right", padding = unit(c(5, 5, 10, 10), "mm"))
```

```{r cci-single-lr-pdf}
lr_pdf  <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCI_heatmap_", lr_example, ".pdf"))
has_lr_x <- lr_example %in% colnames(CCI_x)
has_lr_m <- has_merscope && lr_example %in% colnames(CCI_m)

if (has_lr_x || has_lr_m) {
  pdf(lr_pdf, width = 6, height = 5)
  if (has_lr_x) draw(CCIheatmapOneLR(CCI_x, lr_example),
                     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
                     padding = unit(c(5, 5, 10, 10), "mm"))
  if (has_lr_m) draw(CCIheatmapOneLR(CCI_m, lr_example),
                     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
                     padding = unit(c(5, 5, 10, 10), "mm"))
  dev.off()
  message("Saved: ", lr_pdf)
} else {
  message(lr_example, " not found in CCI results — skipping single-LR PDF.")
}
```

# CCIspatial: top 10 LR pairs per platform

```{r ccispatial-prep}
# Map Xenium/MERSCOPE cells to Visium spot indices (1-based integer)
spot_order    <- setNames(seq_len(nrow(spot_sf)), rownames(spot_sf))
cell_to_hex_x <- spot_order[seu_x$Visium_spot_id]
names(cell_to_hex_x) <- colnames(seu_x)

# n_cells column used by CCIspatial to distinguish empty bins
BLISA_x$bin_sf$n_cells <- BLISA_x$bin_sf$Xenium_cell_count_filtered

if (has_merscope) {
  cell_to_hex_m <- spot_order[seu_m$Visium_spot_id]
  names(cell_to_hex_m) <- colnames(seu_m)
  BLISA_m$bin_sf$n_cells <- BLISA_m$bin_sf$MERSCOPE_cell_count_filtered
}
```

```{r ccispatial-xenium, fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
top10_x <- seq_len(min(10, nrow(BLISA_x$LR_out)))
for (i in top10_x) print(CCIspatial(seu_x, BLISA_x, i,
                                     cell_to_hex = cell_to_hex_x,
                                     ct_group    = params$ct_group,
                                     rotate_cw90 = TRUE))
```

```{r ccispatial-xenium-pdf}
ccispatial_x_pdf <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCIspatial_x.pdf"))
pdf(ccispatial_x_pdf, width = 8, height = 8)
for (i in top10_x) print(CCIspatial(seu_x, BLISA_x, i,
                                     cell_to_hex = cell_to_hex_x,
                                     ct_group    = params$ct_group,
                                     rotate_cw90 = TRUE))
dev.off()
message("Saved: ", ccispatial_x_pdf)
```

```{r ccispatial-merscope, fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
if (has_merscope) {
  top10_m <- seq_len(min(10, nrow(BLISA_m$LR_out)))
  for (i in top10_m) print(CCIspatial(seu_m, BLISA_m, i,
                                       cell_to_hex = cell_to_hex_m,
                                       ct_group    = params$ct_group,
                                       rotate_cw90 = TRUE))
}
```

```{r ccispatial-merscope-pdf}
if (has_merscope) {
  ccispatial_m_pdf <- file.path(out, paste0(sample, "_CCIspatial_m.pdf"))
  pdf(ccispatial_m_pdf, width = 8, height = 8)
  for (i in top10_m) print(CCIspatial(seu_m, BLISA_m, i,
                                       cell_to_hex = cell_to_hex_m,
                                       ct_group    = params$ct_group,
                                       rotate_cw90 = TRUE))
  dev.off()
  message("Saved: ", ccispatial_m_pdf)
}
```

# Session info

```{r session-info, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
